_meta.description: Sire profile for Satono Aladdin — reused across all his progeny listings.

description: Satono Aladdin (JPN) is a son of the legendary Deep Impact, Japan's all-time champion sire and the most influential stallion of his generation. A Gr.1 Yasuda Kinen winner, Satono Aladdin won eight races from 1400m to 2000m, earning over ¥450 million during a career that saw him compete at the highest level from age two through six. Standing at Rich Hill Stud in Matamata, New Zealand, he has rapidly established himself as a leading sire in Australasia. His progeny include dual Oaks winner Pennyweka (Gr.1), Firestorm (Gr.2), Lantern Way (Gr.2), and multiple Gr.3 winners. With a stakes-winner-to-runners ratio of over 13%, he sits among the elite of New Zealand's active stallion roster. His damline — through Storm Cat mare Magic Storm, also dam of Gr.1 winner Lachesis — gives his progeny access to some of the most potent bloodlines in global racing.
stud: Rich Hill Stud, Matamata, New Zealand
notable_progeny: Pennyweka (Gr.1 NZ Oaks, Gr.1 Australian Oaks)
race_record_summary: 8 wins inc. Gr.1 Yasuda Kinen, Gr.2 Swan S., Gr.2 Keio Hai Spring Cup
